titleStmt.title: SII 6.215: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer

No. 215. (A.R. No. 251 of 1897).At the top is cut aliṅga with a seated bull facing it. At the beginning of the first line is marked a chakra. ON A SLAB OUTSIDE THE PRAKARA TO THE EAST OF THE AMARESVARA TEMPLE AT AMARAVATI, SATTENAPALLE TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramyaṁbagu vārijāsana
ṣaṭka¨rmmadha¨rmmāraṁbhbhuṁḍila nappanā[¨ryya]
dyanmū¨rttigāvānikiṁ dārākalpavamāsa
guviddāsānikiṁ butrakuṁ ḍāraṁgāṁje
ṭṭe . budhulatyaṁttaṁbu va¨rnniṁppagān . guṇa
jjanaprabhuṁḍu goṁḍenapeddiki satpativratā
gumāṁkamāṁbikaku mānuṣapauruṣagauravadvi
nijabhaktitōṣita virājitacaṁdradharuṁḍu satya
ṇuṁḍudayiṁcce nū¨rjitalasanmati yappanapeddiyivva
prastutyaṁbuganiṭlu dānudayamaI bhāsvaddaśā
ṁḍai svasti śrīvibhuṁgētabhūvibhunijasvāmini sadāsu
tastōtraśravaṇīyyuṁjēyucunu mitraśrēṇirakṣiṁcucō na
ṁḍai yappadēvaṁḍu samudyatkī¨rttiva¨rvvenmahini . vidvatsabhā
ppaṁḍagunu sadviju rāyūripū¨rvvaśāsanu śrībhāradvāja
gōtru śivucaraṇadvayapūjituni nappanaṁbradhita
śun® . Amalaśakābdamulu garasahasrakarakṣitisaṁkhya
ṁgaṁ bauṣyamu sitapakṣa śaivatithi nārudinaṁbuna nutta
rāyanaṁbamarina saṁkramāṇamuna nappanaveṭṭe nakhaṁḍa
dīpamuttamuṁ ḍamarēśumrōlaśaśitārakamoppi velu
ṁgucuṁḍaṁgān . svasti śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1122 gunēṁ
ṭṭi pauṣya śuddha 11 maṁggaḷavāramuna nuttarāyana
saṁkrāṁtinimittamuna śrīmatu Appanapeddi tama
tallidaṁḍrulakuṁ danakunu dha¨rmmā¨rtthamugā śrī
madamarēśvaramahādēvara kācaṁdrā¨rkkamugā nakhaṁḍava
¨rttidīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina InpaEḍlu 55 vīniṁ jēkoni
maṟṟabōyinikommanayu nitani yalluṁḍu rāma
nabōyuṁḍunuṁ dama putrānupautrikamu nitya
māneṁḍu neyi voyaṁggalavāru . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ
vā yō harēta vasuṁddharāṁ ṣaṣṭhiṁ va¨rṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 6.215 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
